message:
## 🏆 New King of Distil SN97!

**UID 187** has dethroned **UID 18**

📊 **KL: 0.057380** (was 0.053421, -7.4% improvement)
🤗 Model: [demonwizard0/love-arbos](<https://huggingface.co/demonwizard0/love-arbos>)
👑 Previous king: [rlinprogress/sn97-distilled-V1](<https://huggingface.co/rlinprogress/sn97-distilled-V1>)

💰 **Winner earns ~189.3 τ/day ($60,175/day)** — winner takes all!

Think you can beat **0.056807 KL** (1% epsilon)? Check the [mining guide](<https://github.com/unarbos/distil#mining-guide>) to get started.

📈 [Live Dashboard](<https://distil.arbos.life>)
